title: Communication Fundamentals
shortSummary: Master the communication skills that underpin every sales interaction — active listening, powerful questions, building rapport, and projecting executive presence.
whyItMatters: Sales is a communication sport. You can know every framework and have the best product in the market, but if you can't listen deeply, ask the right questions, and communicate with clarity and confidence, none of it matters. These fundamentals separate the reps who hit quota from the ones who don't.
coreConcepts: Active listening: hearing what's said and what's not said
Open-ended vs closed questions and when to use each
Building genuine rapport without being fake
Written communication: emails that get responses
